auto_fix.fix_description: TOD_morning_edge disabled (A/B_ACTIVE->DISABLED_LIVE_CONTRADICTION, gate 50->0). REC2 from Run119 audit (conf=88%)

new_edges: HYPE_SHORT_below_75pct_conf: 53.75% WR +$10.10/trade (n=80) — currently blocked by hype_short_veto
new_weak_setups: HYPE_SHORT_75plus_conf: 31.2% WR -$70.06/trade (n=77) — NOT blocked by any rule

model_optimization.note: Theoretical analysis only — bot offline, no live call data

high_priority_findings.detail: Zero live trading, zero live revenue. trades.csv missing. All feedback loops stalled. Each additional day offline = ~$800-1,200 estimated foregone paper PnL.

high_priority_findings.finding: NEGATIVE EDGE: Kelly fraction = -0.167 (structural R:R deficit)
high_priority_findings.detail: Avg win $82.72 < avg loss $91.27. Win/loss ratio 0.91. At 44.5% WR every 100 trades produces -$1,384 expected loss. No routing fix resolves negative Kelly — requires wider TPs or tighter SLs.
high_priority_findings.action: Code change: widen HYPE SL to 1.5x ATR minimum in bot/execution/leverage.py. Deferred code change RR_GEOMETRY_FIX added.

high_priority_findings.detail: Rule was boosting confidence for morning session (06-12 UTC) despite live WR=28% on 18 trades (-$76.94). Underlying insight invalidated at 96% confidence. Rule disabled: A/B_ACTIVE -> DISABLED_LIVE_CONTRADICTION.

high_priority_findings.finding: hype_short_veto is inverted: blocking profitable band (+$10.10/trade), allowing catastrophic band (-$70.06/trade)
high_priority_findings.detail: HYPE SHORT <75% conf = 53.75% WR +$10.10/trade (n=80). HYPE SHORT 75%+ conf = 31.2% WR -$70.06/trade (n=77). Existing blanket veto is backwards. Need confidence split.
high_priority_findings.action: CODE_CHANGE: Replace hype_short_veto_v1 with hype_short_highconf_veto (block 75%+, allow <75% at 50% size). Confidence 71% — below 75% auto-apply threshold. Tracked as HYPE_SHORT_HIGHCONF_VETO_PROBE rule.

high_priority_findings.detail: 60-70% conf = 48.6% WR; 70-80% = 45.2%; 80-90% = 40.0%; 90%+ = 40.5%. Each 10pp conf increase = ~4pp WR loss. confidence_paradox_sizing_v1 covers 85-90% only. Range 80-100% needs full intervention.
high_priority_findings.action: Expand confidence_paradox rule to cover 80-100% range (not just 85-90%). Confidence 82%.

high_priority_findings.detail: All backtest trades show duration_h=0.0. HoldTimeRuleManager neutered. Cannot validate 3h min hold rule.
